reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of hidden priors, proxy benchmarks, and presentist evaluation rather than opening wholly new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously unifies AI evaluation, historical discovery, and opaque social-information structures under hidden-dependence critique.
falsifiable_why: Refuted by showing architecture-only success, discovery-level word matching, or filter stacks that reliably preserve transformative novelty.
explanation: Visible outputs can mislead when hidden priors, contexts, and social filters drive apparent success.
